message:
🐛 fix(intoto): use cross-namespace translation for search placeholder (#8271) (#8292)

The IntotoSupplyChain card called `useTranslation('cards')` with a single
namespace, then referenced `t('common:searchLayouts' as any)` via the
`common:` prefix. That combination silently resolved nothing — i18next
looks up `searchLayouts` in the `common` namespace at top-level, but the
actual key is nested under `common.searchLayouts` in common.json, and the
`as any` cast hid the typecheck that would have flagged it.

Switch to `useTranslation(['cards', 'common'])` (same pattern as
KyvernoPolicies.tsx:30) and update the key to `common:common.searchLayouts`.
The placeholder now renders "Search layouts..." instead of the raw key.

Addresses #8271 (Copilot review on merged #8260).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
